{{Infobox character
| name = Silent One
| aliases = The Silent One
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = warrior, bodyguard
| affiliations = Witnesses, Witness’ Guild
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Silent One Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A Silent One is a specialized warrior and bodyguard who serves as the protector for a [[Chronicler]]. Within the [[Witness Guild]], these two roles function as pairs: the [[Chronicler]] is responsible for recording and transcribing history, while the Silent One provides security. A common physical trait of a Silent One is covering their mouth with cloth or bandages, which serves as a symbolic refusal to reveal secrets. They are often heavily armed and prepared for combat at all times. Some [[Silent Ones]] are identified as [[Soulbound]], a status that can be quite powerful. [[Tristania]] is an example of a Silent One associated with the [[Guild]] [[Chronicler]] [[Naberius Clayborn]]. She is characterized by her bandages, which cover much of her head and body, and a brown coat that has been invested to act as bulletproof armor. She is proficient with various weapons, including a whip and a broom used for defense. Another Silent One mentioned is the brother of [[Artur]], who serves as his guide and protector.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Serving as a warrior and bodyguard, the Silent One maintains a distinct appearance by covering his mouth to symbolize his refusal to speak secrets. During one encounter, he is found positioned near a body clad in black. He eventually travels alongside [[Naberius]] with a noticeable limp, acting as a protective entity utilized by his master.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Silent One]] is a warrior and bodyguard.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Silent One]] covers his mouth as a symbol of refusing to speak secrets.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Silent One]] is a character near whom a body in black lay.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius]] has a [[Silent One]] that limps along beside him.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Silent One]] is a protection or entity that [[Naberius]] uses.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Killing a [[Chronicler]] might involve fighting a [[Silent One]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Silent One]]'s eyes brushed past [[Shera]]’s tunnel.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Silent One]] is associated with [[Naberius Clayborn]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Silent One]] is a role within the [[Witnesses]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Silent Ones]] keep their mouths covered and carry weapons strapped all over.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Silent Ones]] are present in the room.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Silent One]] is responsible for protecting a [[Chronicler]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Silent One]] is a role performed by the Heads of the [[Witness]]’ [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Soldiers]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
